text.title: Predictive Analytics for PM Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Predictive Analytics for PM applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Model: pm-risk-1 v1.2.0 Feature spec v3 (12 features incl. scope_change_count, vendor_lead_time_avg, team_attrition_rate, EVM_CPI, ...). Training corpus: 142 projects 2022-2026. Calibration (2026-05-01): brier=0.18, pi80=0.79, pi95=0.94. Sample forecast (acme-platform-2026-Q2, schedule_slip_weeks): point: 2.4 weeks pi_80: [1.0, 4.0] pi_95: [0.5, 6.0] top_features: - scope_change_count (contribution 0.35) - vendor_lead_time_avg (0.21) - team_attrition_rate (0.15) PMO action: pre-emptive scope freeze + vendor renegotiation.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
